```{r}
# Define file paths

## House Prices
path_rental_panel <- here::here("data", "processed", "general_panel", "rentals")
path_rental_panel <- here::here("data", "processed", "general_panel", "rentals")

## Sewage Spills
path_spill <- here::here("data", "processed", "agg_spill_stats")
path_rental_controls <- here::here(
  "data",
  "processed",
  "zoopla",
  "zoopla_rentals.parquet"
)
```
